description: The asset database has become messy over the years. Consolidate duplicate asset models for Lenovo laptops and Dell monitors into two canonical models. Update the 'ThinkPad T14 Gen 2' model number to '20W0009DUS' and the 'Dell UltraSharp U2720Q' model number to 'U2720Q'. Reassign all assets currently associated with 'Lenovo T14' or 'ThinkPad T-14G2' to 'ThinkPad T14 Gen 2', and all assets associated with 'Dell U2720Q' or '27-inch Dell Monitor' to 'Dell UltraSharp U2720Q'. Delete the four duplicate models ('Lenovo T14', 'ThinkPad T-14G2', 'Dell U2720Q', and '27-inch Dell Monitor') without modifying any other system data.
